data.name: 我的媽媽是魅魔
data.detailed_description:
千晶發現自己最近常在思考人生哲學：什麼時候才能真正成為大人？怎樣成為一個男人？怎樣才能讓繼母回應我的情慾？

一連串怪事始於一個下雨天。千晶全身濕透地趕回家，在浴室裡碰到了正在換衣服的赤裸裸的繼母！他對繼母的毫無波瀾感到有些失望，難道她真的不在乎被他看到嗎？這幕場景實在印象太深刻了，當他夜裡默默自慰時腦海中也清晰地浮現。但這時突然被他的繼母打斷了！

她長得簡直一模一樣：一樣的巨乳、一樣的可愛臉蛋、一樣的A級巨乳肥臀。雖然她有粉紅色的頭髮和淫蕩的服裝，但很顯然是麻奈香沒錯？但她堅稱自己叫 “瑪娜”，是在夢中拜訪他的魅魔，絕對不是他的繼母麻奈香！而她當場開始為千晶手淫，那也不能怪千晶沒有繼續對她進行深入的身份調查了。

可憐的千晶，又飢渴又迷茫...... 每當他硬起來，瑪娜出現照顧他的時候，他都無法擺脫這種感覺。為什麼他做兼職的那家店老闆突然頻傳提到魅魔傳說？千晶的繼母真的是魅魔嗎？魅魔真的存在嗎？ ！

在《我的媽媽是魅魔》中，您的選擇將影響這些問題的答案以及最終結局！



遊戲特色

  • 原版日本視覺小說的翻譯版本

  • 瑪娜 & 麻奈香 完全由原版日文對白配音

  • 原畫高清升級，有 16:9 和 4:3 兩種版本

  • 數小時的故事內容

  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效

  • 增強的動畫角色渲染

  • 圖庫和場景選擇

  • 18 個 H 場景和 4 個結局，取決於千晶對瑪娜角色的懷疑程度！

我的媽媽是魅魔是由日本傳奇開發商 ORCSOFT 製作的視覺小說的英文在地化版本。我們 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原始的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**

所有描述和視覺再現的角色均已年滿 18 歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中無任何實際或可識別的未成年人參與。

data.short_description: 千晶遇到了一個大難題：他的繼母麻奈香 極度性感。所以，當一個有著和她一樣的聲音、一樣的臉、一樣的大奶子的魅魔晚上突然出現在他的房間裡，她可以一直堅稱自己叫做瑪娜，但反正最終他還是會叫她媽媽~
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: SUCCU-MAMA
data.detailed_description:
Chiaki often finds himself pondering life's biggest questions; when does one truly become an adult? What makes a man a man? How can I get my step-mom to reciprocate my lustful feelings?

A series of strange events start occurring on a certain rainy day. Chiaki rushes home soaked to the bone to run into his shirtless step-mother mid change in the bathroom! He's a little disappointed by her lack of reaction though, does she really think nothing of being seen by him? He most certainly wont be forgetting the sight any time soon with the image clear in his mind's eye Chiaki undergoes his nightly self care routine when he is interrupted by HIS STEP-MOM?!

She looks practically identical, the same giant wobbly tits, same cute face, same A-grade MILF hips, except for the pink hair and lewd costume, but that's clearly Manaka, right? Well, she insists her names is "Mana" and she is a succubus visiting him in his dreams, definitely not his step-mom! Who can blame Chiaki for not conducting a thorough interview once she started jerking him off on the spot!

Poor Chiaki, so horny and confused... Every time he gets hard and Mana appears to take care of him he can't shake the feeling there something strange going on. Why is his boss at his part time job ranting and raving about "drainface" and succubus lore all of a sudden? Is Chiaki's mom really a succubus? are succubi even real?!

The choices you make will affect the answers to these questions and more in SUCCU-MAMA!

Mana is a succubus that cums in the night and oddly looks a lot like my step-mother!?

Manaka is my step-mom, a MILF with all the right credentials~ massive mommy milkers, curves for days and a cute face for all you can imagine.

FEATURES

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Mana and Manaka are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio, including music and special effects

  • Enhanced with animated character sprites

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • 18 H-Scenes and 4 endings depending on how suspicious Chiaki is of this Mana character!

SUCCU-MAMA is the English localization of a Visual Novel created by legendary Japanese developer ORCSOFT. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Chiaki has a problem. His step-mom is EXTREMELY hot. When a succubus that has the same voice as her, the same face as her, the same massive tits as her appears in his room he's gonna need some answers. she can insist her name is Mana all she wants but he'll end up calling her mommy anyway~
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
